category_sources: Official homepage says ip_relay shapes forwarded TCP traffic to a specified bandwidth and acts as a TCP proxy.
source_facts.description says it is a TCP traffic shaping relay application.
docs_sources: Official homepage links README and FAQ and describes options, behavior, and examples.
source_facts.homepage is the official project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage offers release tarballs but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes bandwidth shaping, TCP proxy behavior, and bandwidth-limit simulation.
source_facts.description identifies TCP traffic shaping relay scope.
